attributes.additional_details: In the eyes of the world and the British people  Keir Starmer has shown himself to be an unfit Prime Minister causing extreme embarrassment to the people of the UK and has brought the office of Prime Minister into disrepute.
attributes.background: Keir Starmer the current Prime Minister should be replaced with an individual who can hold the respect of the British People at large and who can repair the reputation of the UK on the world stage.

rejection.details: We can't accept petitions about appointments, which includes calling for elected representatives or public servants to resign or be removed from office.
